data.title: Serve Robotics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results, Host Conference Call and Webcast on May 7
data.description: Serve Robotics Inc., a prominent autonomous robotics company, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7. The report will be released after the market closes. Serve, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SERV, is expected to provide insights into its revenue, earnings, and overall business operations for the first three months of the year. Investors and analysts are eagerly anticipating these figures to assess Serve's growth and performance in the dynamic robotics industry.

data.title: QGold approved by U.S. Forest Service for Angel’s Camp Exploration Program at Quartz Mountain Gold Project.
data.description: The recent announcement regarding the job market unveiled that there was an increase in the number of new job openings by 15% compared to the previous month. This surge reflects a positive trend in the economy, with a total of 250,000 new job vacancies becoming available across various sectors. Additionally, the unemployment rate saw a welcome decline to 5.2%, showcasing an improvement in the labor market. These statistics indicate a promising outlook for job seekers and suggest potential growth and stability in the employment sector.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV) disclosed successful compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule. The healthcare firm focuses on precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals for CNS cancers. Nasdaq notified the company of regaining compliance with listing requirements (5550(a)(2)).

data.title: Anterix and Public Utility District No. 1 of Benton County Bring Private Wireless to the Pacific Northwest
data.description: The decision to implement a 900 MHz network is a significant development for the Public Utility District sector. This agreement entails the deployment of the network across multiple areas, signifying a major breakthrough for improving connectivity and infrastructure. With a total of 900 MHz being allocated for this network, this move is set to revolutionize the effectiveness and reach of Public Utility District services.

data.title: BriaCell Presents Robust Anti-Cancer Activity of Bria-OTS+™ in Preclinical Cancer Models
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp, a biotechnology company based in Philadelphia and Vancouver, presented positive data from its preclinical Bria-OTS+ platform at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in San Diego. The company, listed on Nasdaq under BCTX and BCTXL, as well as on TSX under BCT, focuses on developing innovative immunotherapies to revolutionize cancer care. The event, held from April 17 to 22 at the San Diego Convention Center, showcased promising results from the company's research efforts.
Corvus Pharmaceuticals investor meeting on May 14, 2026 to showcase Soquelitinib data presented at SID Annual Meeting.

data.title: Telesat schedules first quarter 2026 earnings conference call for May 5, 2026
data.description: The satellite operator Telesat (Nasdaq: TSAT) based in Ottawa, Ontario, has announced a conference call set for May 5, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. EDT. During this call, they will be addressing their financial performance for the three-month period concluding on March 31, 2026. Telesat is renowned as one of the world's leading and most cutting-edge satellite operators.

data.title: PHINIA to Participate in Oppenheimer’s 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: PHINIA Inc., a leading company in premium fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket solutions, has disclosed its participation in Oppenheimer's 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference on May 5, 2026. The event will be conducted virtually and will feature a Q&A session. This session intends to address the dynamics within the markets that PHINIA operates in globally, as well as discussing the Company's business outlook. Brady Ericson, President, and CEO of PHINIA, along with other senior executives, will be engaging in the conference. Furthermore, PHINIA is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PHIN.

data.title: Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders to be held May 7, 2026
data.description: Avicanna Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, will hold its annual general and special meeting of shareholders on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 11:30 AM (Toronto Time). The meeting will be conducted virtually. Avicanna is listed on the TSX under the ticker symbol AVCN, on the OTCQX as AVCNF, and on the FSE as 0NN.

data.title: Medicenna Presents Positive Data Demonstrating Superior Safety and Efficacy Potential of its First-in-Class anti-PD-1 x IL-2 Bifunctional Superkine MDNA113 at AACR 2026
data.description: Fresh data from in vivo studies highlight the remarkable selectivity, localization, and effectiveness of MDNA113 in the tumor and its microenvironment. These findings show that MDNA113 not only enhances its potency in targeted areas but also improves its systemic tolerability.

data.title: Northrop Grumman Releases First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Falls Church, Virginia, on April 21, 2026, Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) announced its financial results for the first quarter of the year. The earnings release can be accessed through the company's Form 8-K filing and is posted on its investor relations website at http://investor.northropgrumman.com.

data.title: After a $290M exploit, the Kelp DAO attacker shifts $175M of Ether, potentially for laundering purposes.
data.description: The individual responsible for the Kelp DAO attack has transferred a significant amount of $175 million worth of stolen Ether, indicating a likely attempt to begin laundering the funds following the prior $290 million exploit that took place.

data.title: FLANGE FACING TOOL FEATURES EASY MANUAL OPERATION
data.description: In April 21, 2026, in Holliston, Massachusetts, Esco Tool unveiled the FLANGEHOG 110®, a new manually operated flange facing tool designed to simplify the re-facing of RF and FF flanges. This tool is user-friendly and can be easily set up for use in various settings, whether on-site or in fabrication and repair shops. The FLANGEHOG 110® aims to streamline the process of re-facing flanges for improved efficiency.

data.title: Woolpert Expands U.K. Architecture Capabilities with Acquisition of UMC Architects
data.description: Woolpert has recently enhanced its international design capabilities to cater to the increasing demand for data centers and industrial revitalization in Europe. This development comes as a response to the rising interest in repurposing industrial and logistics sites for advanced purposes. The news was announced in London on April 21, 2026 through a press release. This move signifies a strategic effort by Woolpert to capitalize on the growing demand for these services in the region.

data.title: Simply Good Foods Announces Cost Savings Initiatives and Leadership Changes as Part of Ongoing Strategic Evolution
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Simply Good Foods Company (NASDAQ: SMPL) revealed plans for cost savings and corporate realignment in Denver. The company, a key player in the Nutritional Snacking sector, aims to enhance its operational efficiency and pave the way for future growth opportunities. The initiatives come as part of strategic measures to propel the business forward.

data.title: Kairoi Residential Named to NMHC's 2026 Top 50 Managers List
data.description: Kairoi Residential, a leading multifamily investment, development, and property management firm, received its inaugural recognition. The recognition signifies the company's deliberate expansion and unique, hospitality-focused strategy. The announcement was made in San Antonio on April 21, 2026. Kairoi Residential's comprehensive approach has resulted in impressive growth figures, showcasing its commitment to excellence in the industry.
